headline: MoE-certified: C1+C2 real-weight across all 32 layers (toward L1); C4 topology available (L0)
headline_note: Per ADR-007 the bare word 'certified' is forbidden for MoE. On the REAL Mixtral-8x7B-v0.1 weights this milestone certifies C1 (per-expert) exhaustively over ALL 32 layers x 8 experts = 256 experts and C2 (router top-2 SET EQUALITY) on all 32 layers, vs a float64 reference computed one expert at a time. C3 (GQA attention) is satisfied at the mechanism level (the mixtral_scale topology full-forward cert). C4 (assembly/topology) already exists as the L0 cert (mixtral_scale 1.639e-7) but is not folded here. This is the substantive L1 component work; it is NOT the dense ADR-004 CERTIFIED, and NOT L2 (C4 fold) / L3 (C5 active-path) / L4 (global F64).

C1_per_expert.scope: ALL 32 layers x 8 experts = 256 experts (exhaustive; all layers are MoE, no dense-first, no shared expert)
C1_per_expert.weights: real trained Mixtral-8x7B-v0.1 weights (bf16, 19 safetensors shards)
C1_per_expert.oracle: NumPy/torch float64, one expert at a time, one layer at a time (no full-model F64)
C1_per_expert.metric: max_abs_diff(Atenia expert forward, F64 reference) per expert, single deterministic probe input
C1_per_expert.gate: max_abs_diff < 0.5 for EVERY expert (ADR-004 bar, unchanged)
C1_per_expert.result: all 256 experts < 0.5 (global worst ~1.9e-6, ~2.6e5x inside the gate)

C2_router.hard_gate: top-2 expert SET EQUALITY vs the F64 reference, every layer
C2_router.routing_margin_note: gap between the 2nd and 3rd router logit per layer; the tightest layer (13, margin 0.0114) still matched exactly. norm_topk_prob renorm does not affect the top-k SET.
C2_router.result: top-2 set identical on all 32 layers

C3_attention.evidence: Mixtral topology full-forward cert (mixtral_scale 1.639e-7 vs HF, tests/moe_scale_cert_test.rs::mixtral_8x7b_topology_certifies) -- a reduced-dim full transformer incl. GQA attention + RoPE + the MoE block
C3_attention.caveat: certifies the GQA attention MECHANISM (tiny topology fixture), NOT the real-weight per-layer attention re-certified. Same standard as Qwen-MoE / DeepSeek C3. Recorded, not over-claimed.

C4_assembly_topology.evidence: mixtral_scale topology full-forward cert = 1.639e-7 vs HF f64 (tests/moe_scale_cert_test.rs::mixtral_8x7b_topology_certifies; argmax exact)
C4_assembly_topology.note: C4 already exists as the Mixtral L0 topology cert. Folding it (L1 + C4 -> L2) is a small follow-up (MIXTRAL-CERT C4). Not claimed as L2 in this milestone.

C5_active_path.blocker: real-weight full forward (GQA attention + MoE) vs F64 one-layer-at-a-time, not yet run. RAM-feasible via the MLA-2/MOE-PROD disk expert-tier (the graph families already support ATENIA_MOE_EXPERT_TIER=disk), as proven on Qwen-MoE / DeepSeek-V2-Lite.

pending_levels.blocker: this milestone supplies C1+C2 (real) + C3 (mechanism); L1 is reached. (Listed for clarity: C3 is mechanism-level, same caveat as Qwen/DeepSeek.)
fold C4 (the mixtral_scale topology cert already exists) -> a small follow-up.
C5 real-weight full forward vs F64 one-layer-at-a-time (disk expert-tier).
global model.double() F64 (~374 GB) -- reserved / unreachable; never fabricated.

remaining_caveats: C3 attention reused at the mechanism level (tiny topology fixture), not real-weight per-layer (same standard as Qwen/DeepSeek).
C1/C2 use a single deterministic probe input applied to every layer's real weights (representative activation, not a real inter-layer trace) -- consistent with the Qwen / DeepSeek approach.
C4 (mixtral_scale topology) is certified at the MECHANISM level (reduced-dim fixture); it transfers to the real model only in conjunction with the real-weight C1/C2 (met).
This is the C1+C2 component work toward L1; it is NOT the dense ADR-004 CERTIFIED, and NOT L2/L3/L4.

verification.c1_c2_reference: fixtures/moe/mixtral_decomp_ref.safetensors (+ .json), float64 one expert at a time (~4.2 MB); generator fixtures/moe/generate_mixtral_decomposition_reference.py (resumable)
verification.c1_c2_command: python fixtures/moe/generate_mixtral_decomposition_reference.py models/Mixtral-8x7B-v0.1 fixtures/moe ; then MIXTRAL_DIR=models/Mixtral-8x7B-v0.1 cargo test --release --test moe_mixtral_decomposition_test -- --ignored mixtral_real_c1_c2 --nocapture
verification.c1_c2_expected: C1 global worst max_abs_diff ~1.9e-6 (< 0.5, all 256 experts, layer 8 / expert 1); C2 top-2 set match on all 32 layers; min routing margin 0.011413 (layer 13); 0 failures.

generated_on: F64 reference: torch (bf16->float64) + NumPy float64, Windows 11 (model on HDD; per-layer-resumable generator + harness). Atenia: CPU forward, RTX 4070 Laptop host, 32 GB RAM.
